title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, uses Claude Skills to automate work through three key strategies: agents, hooks, and loops. The video reverse-engineers Cherny's system from interviews and config files to identify the most impactful but underutilized features within Claude Code for automation.
